enabled.description: Enable the hosted webchat GUI provider.

public_base_url.description: Public base URL used to derive hosted GUI and Direct Line routes.

mode.description: Delivery mode used by the runner.

route.description: Routing key or channel route used for outbound messages.

tenant_channel_id.description: Tenant-scoped channel identifier used for webchat routing.

base_url.description: Optional host base URL for push/websocket endpoints.
